Done — completion has been logged. Implemented and validated the approved fix for proposal build-failure handling so task/UI state stays in sync while preserving self-healing: - Updated `src/gateway/tasks/background-task-runner.ts` - Added a build-failure retry counter. - Replaced unconditional pause with staged behavior: - First failure: enter recovery path (`recovering_from_build_error`) to allow one self-heal attempt. - Subsequent failure(s): pause as genuinely stuck. - Ensured task state wiring exposes recovery status clearly so the UI no longer incorrectly shows “paused” during active recovery. - Validation passed: - `npm run build` succeeded (TypeScript compile clean). - Scope remained aligned to proposal intent with no unnecessary file changes. Outcome: transient build failures now get one intelligent recovery attempt without UI desync; tasks pause only when recovery is actually exhausted.
